clubs.name: University Club of Phoenix
clubs.notes: Permanently closed June 30, 2025 due to declining membership after 60 years. Phoenix Country Club extended social memberships to former members. RECOMMEND REMOVAL FROM ROSTER.

clubs.name: The Balboa Bay Club
clubs.notes: balboabayresort.com is the affiliated public hotel — not the same.

clubs.name: Essex Yacht Club
clubs.notes: Distinct from Essex Corinthian Yacht Club (separate club, same town).

clubs.name: The Elm City Club
clubs.notes: Legacy graduateclub.com still resolves to same site. Located at 155 Elm St., former Graduate Club building.

clubs.name: The Quinnipiac Club
clubs.notes: Merged with Graduate Club in 2012 to form The Elm City Club. Historic Church Street building sold to Biohaven for $4.1M; club no longer operates. RECOMMEND REMOVAL — already covered by Elm City Club entry.

clubs.name: Epping Forest Yacht Club
clubs.notes: Full name on site: 'Epping Forest Yacht & Country Club'.
